normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_length_preserving (arr : List Int) : (merge_sort arr).length = arr.length
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The output length equals the input length (no elements are dropped or added).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_sorted_nondec (arr : List Int) : Sorted (fun a b : Int => a ≤ b) (merge_sort arr)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The output is sorted in nondecreasing order.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_permutation (arr : List Int) : (merge_sort arr).Multiset = arr.Multiset
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The output is a permutation of the input (same multiset of elements).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_terminates (arr : List Int) : WellFounded (measure (fun xs => xs.length))
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Top-down recursion terminates by decreasing list length on each split.
